title: Amtech F1750 8 Piece masonry drill bit set
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: FOR LIGHTWEIGHT JOBS: This masonry drill bit set is suitable for light duty drilling in masonry and light density brick and block
VERSATILE: The bits can be used in most keyed and keyless drill chucks
SIZES: Supplied in plastic storage case, the set includes sizes 3mm, 4mm, 5mm, 6mm, 7mm, 8mm, 9mm and 10mm
ERGONOMIC GRIP: Comfortable to hold for better control
HOUSEHOLD & PROFESSIONAL USE: Suitable for DIYers and tradespeople alike
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 8Pc Masonry Drill Bit Set See more
